stat.title: Reached on Error Merchants
stat.subtitle: Plate appearances where the batter reached on a fielding error.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales reached on error · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Joey Ortiz. Bryan Reynolds scores. Esmerlyn Valdez to 3rd.
